display_name_sources: source_facts.name: dpkg; source_facts.homepage is the official Dpkg team page.
docs_sources: Official dpkg.org site lists documentation and points to the Debian wiki for project information and documentation.
repo_sources: Official dpkg.org development section says code can be cloned from git.dpkg.org; the official cgit browser lists dpkg/dpkg.git as Debian package management system; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Debian package management system; source_facts.executables lists dpkg and related tools.
